Cards.Hint: AWS Cloud Technical Essentials- udacity - research

Cards.Back: Designed to deliver fast performance for workloads that process large data sets in memory. | Memory-intensive applications such as high-performance databases, distributed web-scale in-memory caches, mid-size in-memory databases, real-time big-data analytics, and other enterprise applications.
Cards.Hint: AWS Cloud Technical Essentials- udacity - research
